in_scope_pages.name: Project status and workflow handoff
in_scope_pages.why_it_matters: Every resumed session depends on the same acceptance facts.

in_scope_pages.name: Agent dispatch templates
in_scope_pages.why_it_matters: FE, QA, and visual review must all read the same recovery contract.

out_of_scope_notes: Pixel-perfect screenshot comparison is not required for every page.
This contract governs workflow recovery and acceptance scope, not product feature behavior.

critical_user_flows.name: Codex interrupted, Antigravity resumes
steps: Codex modifies implementation or tests and stops unexpectedly
Antigravity re-enters the project via status or resume flow
Antigravity reads project memory, state, logs, and acceptance contract
Antigravity continues orchestration without redefining acceptance scope
critical_user_flows.expected_result: Recovery preserves the same acceptance boundary and does not drop critical validation items.

critical_user_flows.name: QA validates from contract after context loss
preconditions: doc/test-plan.md exists or can be regenerated
QA executor can access acceptance contract
steps: QA verifies critical flows, required UI states, and non-regression guards
QA updates doc/test-report.md and screenshot evidence manifest
critical_user_flows.expected_result: QA output remains aligned even when the previous implementation session is unavailable.

required_ui_states.notes: Each state must preserve the same acceptance scope.
Recovery must not skip evidence collection.

non_regression_guards.rule: No agent may redefine validation scope without updating this contract.
QA must read the contract before running or summarizing tests.
Visual review must use the contract screenshot list instead of ad hoc page selection.

must_match: QA report references the contract revision

evidence.notes: These are acceptance evidence anchors for recovery scenarios, not mandatory full visual baselines.

exit_criteria: All P0 flows pass or have explicit failure reasons documented
FE self-check exists and references the current contract revision
BE self-check exists and references the current contract revision
QA reads this contract before running tests
Visual review uses the screenshot evidence list from this contract
doc/acceptance-screenshots/manifest.json is updated after acceptance work
Resumed sessions do not invent a new acceptance scope from memory alone
handoff_notes: If context is lost, read this file before resuming implementation, QA, or visual review.
When scope changes, update this file first and then regenerate test expectations.
